name: posts_summary_published
query: query BenchPostsSummary($first: Int, $skip: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, skip: $skip, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug excerpt publishedDate readingTime featured category { name slug } author { name } } _allPostsMeta { count } }

name: posts_summary_preview
query: query BenchPostsSummary($first: Int, $skip: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, skip: $skip, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug excerpt publishedDate readingTime featured category { name slug } author { name } } _allPostsMeta { count } }

name: posts_deep_published
query: query BenchPostsDeep($first: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug content { value blocks { __typename ... on HeroSectionRecord { id headline subheadline } ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } ... on FeatureGridRecord { id heading features { value blocks { __typename ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } } ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } inlineBlocks { __typename } links } category { id name slug } author { id name } } }

name: posts_deep_preview
query: query BenchPostsDeep($first: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug content { value blocks { __typename ... on HeroSectionRecord { id headline subheadline } ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } ... on FeatureGridRecord { id heading features { value blocks { __typename ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } } ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } inlineBlocks { __typename } links } category { id name slug } author { id name } } }

name: post_by_slug_deep_published
query: query BenchPostBySlug($slug: String!) { post(filter: { slug: { eq: $slug } }) { id title slug content { value blocks { __typename ... on HeroSectionRecord { id headline subheadline } ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } ... on FeatureGridRecord { id heading features { value blocks { __typename ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } } } } author { id name } category { id name slug } } }

name: post_by_slug_deep_preview
query: query BenchPostBySlug($slug: String!) { post(filter: { slug: { eq: $slug } }) { id title slug content { value blocks { __typename ... on HeroSectionRecord { id headline subheadline } ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } ... on FeatureGridRecord { id heading features { value blocks { __typename ... on FeatureCardRecord { id title description details { value blocks { __typename ... on CodeBlockRecord { id language filename code } } } } } } } } } author { id name } category { id name slug } } }

name: posts_filter_category_published
query: query BenchPostsByCategory($categoryId: ID!, $first: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, filter: { category: { eq: $categoryId } }, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug category { id name } author { id name } } _allPostsMeta(filter: { category: { eq: $categoryId } }) { count } }

name: posts_filter_category_preview
query: query BenchPostsByCategory($categoryId: ID!, $first: Int) { allPosts(first: $first, filter: { category: { eq: $categoryId } }, orderBy: [publishedDate_DESC]) { id title slug category { id name } author { id name } } _allPostsMeta(filter: { category: { eq: $categoryId } }) { count } }
